analysis.summary: Grafana is a comprehensive observability platform that processes metrics and logs from multiple data sources, renders interactive dashboards with real-time visualizations, and manages alerting workflows for monitoring and incident response.
capabilities: Renders interactive data visualizations and dashboards from multiple data sources (public/app/core/services/backend_srv.ts)
Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/)
Manages alerting rules evaluation and notification delivery to external systems (pkg/services/ngalert/)
Provides user authentication and authorization with RBAC (pkg/services/auth/)
Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
Manages dashboard provisioning and configuration as code (pkg/services/provisioning/)
Processes plugin installations and manages plugin lifecycle (pkg/plugins/)
Handles data source configuration and health monitoring (pkg/services/datasources/)
Manages team-based access control and organizational units (pkg/services/team/, pkg/services/org/)
technical_stack: Go (primary backend language, go.mod files throughout)
Grafana UI component library (@grafana/ui in package.json)

technical_facts: Renders interactive data visualizations and dashboards from multiple data sources (public/app/core/services/backend_srv.ts)
Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/)
Manages alerting rules evaluation and notification delivery to external systems (pkg/services/ngalert/)
Provides user authentication and authorization with RBAC (pkg/services/auth/)
Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
Manages dashboard provisioning and configuration as code (pkg/services/provisioning/)
Processes plugin installations and manages plugin lifecycle (pkg/plugins/)
Handles data source configuration and health monitoring (pkg/services/datasources/)
Manages team-based access control and organizational units (pkg/services/team/, pkg/services/org/)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: Go goroutines with HTTP server handling concurrent requests, background services for alerting evaluation and provisioning
dependencies: Infrastructure: External data sources (Prometheus, InfluxDB, etc.)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/) and Renders interactive data visualizations and dashboards from multiple data sources (public/app/core/services/backend_srv.ts)
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: API endpoints with specific paths like /api/dashboards/db and /api/tsdb/query (pkg/api/) but handles multiple data source formats from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/) and Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Go goroutines with HTTP server handling concurrent requests, background services for alerting evaluation and provisioning with Redis caching layer (pkg/infra/remotecache/)
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High plugin architecture (pkg/plugins/), multi-database support (SQLite/PostgreSQL/MySQL), and modular data source integration (pkg/tsdb/) make it adaptable. Core time-series aggregation and visualization logic is domain-agnostic.

evidence_claims.evidence: Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/)
Processes plugin installations and manages plugin lifecycle (pkg/plugins/)
Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
SQLite (default database, pkg/services/sqlstore/), PostgreSQL (supported database, docker/blocks/postgres/), MySQL (supported database, pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/)

analysis.summary: Rocket.Chat is an open-source team communication platform built on Meteor/Node.js that provides real-time messaging, omnichannel customer support, and collaborative workspace features with role-based access control and extensive integration capabilities.
capabilities: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers)
Two-factor authentication with TOTP and email verification (apps/meteor/app/2fa/server/)
Omnichannel customer support with transcript generation (ee/apps/omnichannel-transcript/)
REST API with comprehensive endpoint coverage (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)
File upload and storage with S3 and Google Cloud integration (apps/meteor dependencies @aws-sdk, @google-cloud/storage)
Video conferencing integration with WebRTC (apps/meteor dependencies)
User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/)
Push notifications via FCM and APN (apps/meteor dependencies @parse/node-apn)
OAuth2 server functionality (apps/meteor dependency @node-oauth/oauth2-server)
PDF generation for transcripts and reports (dependencies @react-pdf/renderer)
Email processing and SMTP integration (apps/meteor/app/api/server/lib/emailInbox.ts)
Rate limiting and security controls (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)
Multi-tenant workspace support with role-based permissions
App marketplace and custom app development platform (dependencies @rocket.chat/apps-engine)
integrations: AWS S3 for file storage (@aws-sdk packages)

api_endpoints.path: Various REST API endpoints under /api/v1/ namespace (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)

technical_facts: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers)
Two-factor authentication with TOTP and email verification (apps/meteor/app/2fa/server/)
Omnichannel customer support with transcript generation (ee/apps/omnichannel-transcript/)
REST API with comprehensive endpoint coverage (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)
File upload and storage with S3 and Google Cloud integration (apps/meteor dependencies @aws-sdk, @google-cloud/storage)
Video conferencing integration with WebRTC (apps/meteor dependencies)
User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/)
Push notifications via FCM and APN (apps/meteor dependencies @parse/node-apn)
OAuth2 server functionality (apps/meteor dependency @node-oauth/oauth2-server)
PDF generation for transcripts and reports (dependencies @react-pdf/renderer)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: async/await with Node.js event loop, Meteor Fibers for legacy code, microservices communication via NATS
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (multiple workflow files in .github/)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers), User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/), microservices architecture with NATS message broker
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: MongoDB 6.16.0 (multiple package.json files), TypeScript (5843 .ts files, package.json typescript ~5.9.3), REST API with comprehensive endpoint coverage
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: NATS message broker (nats ^2.28.2), Moleculer microservices framework (moleculer ^0.14.35), WebSocket support for real-time state synchronization across distributed services
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: NATS message broker for async communication, WebSocket handlers for real-time messaging, microservices architecture with distributed state management
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to modular microservices architecture with clear separation of concerns. Core real-time messaging, presence tracking, and orchestration patterns are highly reusable across domains requiring collaborative features.

evidence_claims.claim: Real-time messaging capabilities with WebSocket support
evidence_claims.evidence: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers)
NATS message broker (nats ^2.28.2), Moleculer microservices framework (moleculer ^0.14.35)
User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/)
File upload and storage with S3 and Google Cloud integration (apps/meteor dependencies @aws-sdk, @google-cloud/storage)

information_gaps: Database schema details beyond MongoDB usage
Message queue depth and processing guarantees

analysis.summary: Mastodon is a federated social network server implementing ActivityPub protocol. It provides a Ruby on Rails web application with REST/Streaming APIs, OAuth2 authentication, media handling, and real-time features for decentralized social networking.
capabilities: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb)
REST API endpoints for client applications (app/controllers/api/*.rb)
Real-time streaming API using WebSocket connections (streaming/index.js)
OAuth2 authentication and authorization (Gemfile: omniauth, devise)
Media attachment processing and storage (Gemfile: kt-paperclip, ruby-vips)
Full-text search using Elasticsearch integration (app/chewy/*.rb)
Background job processing with Sidekiq (Procfile: sidekiq worker)
Administrative interface for moderation and server management (app/controllers/admin/*.rb)
Multi-language internationalization support (package.json: @formatjs/intl-pluralrules)
Two-factor authentication support (Gemfile: devise-two-factor)
technical_stack: AWS S3 for media storage (Gemfile: aws-sdk-s3)
integrations: AWS S3 for media storage (Gemfile: aws-sdk-s3)

api_endpoints.path: REST API for client applications (app/controllers/api/v1/*.rb pattern)
Streaming API for real-time updates (streaming server)

technical_facts: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb)
REST API endpoints for client applications (app/controllers/api/*.rb)
Real-time streaming API using WebSocket connections (streaming/index.js)
OAuth2 authentication and authorization (Gemfile: omniauth, devise)
Media attachment processing and storage (Gemfile: kt-paperclip, ruby-vips)
Full-text search using Elasticsearch integration (app/chewy/*.rb)
Background job processing with Sidekiq (Procfile: sidekiq worker)
Administrative interface for moderation and server management (app/controllers/admin/*.rb)
Multi-language internationalization support (package.json: @formatjs/intl-pluralrules)
Two-factor authentication support (Gemfile: devise-two-factor)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: multi-threaded via Puma server, async job processing via Sidekiq, real-time streaming via WebSocket connections in Node.js
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (workflow files mentioned in README badges)

REST API endpoints for client applications (app/controllers/api/*.rb)
Real-time streaming API using WebSocket connections (streaming/index.js)
OAuth2 authentication and authorization (Gemfile: omniauth, devise)
Media attachment processing and storage (Gemfile: kt-paperclip, ruby-vips)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: multi-threaded via Puma server, async job processing via Sidekiq, real-time streaming via WebSocket connections in Node.js
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (workflow files mentioned in README badges)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb), Background job processing with Sidekiq (Procfile: sidekiq worker), Administrative interface for moderation and server management (app/controllers/admin/*.rb) - manages complex workflows across multiple services and maintains state across federation
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: PostgreSQL 14 (docker-compose.yml, Gemfile: pg) as primary database with Rails models, ActivityPub protocol implementation requiring structured JSON-LD format
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: ActivityPub federation creates distributed social graph, Full-text search using Elasticsearch integration (app/chewy/*.rb) for graph traversal and relationship mapping
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: PostgreSQL 14 (docker-compose.yml, Gemfile: pg) as primary database, multi-threaded via Puma server, async job processing via Sidekiq for maintaining data consistency in federated network
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High reusability due to modular architecture with REST APIs, OAuth2 authentication, background job processing, and federation protocol. Core components (user management, content distribution, real-time streaming) are applicable to many social/collaborative platforms.

evidence_claims.evidence: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb)
REST API endpoints for client applications (app/controllers/api/*.rb)
Real-time streaming API using WebSocket connections (streaming/index.js)
OAuth2 authentication and authorization (Gemfile: omniauth, devise), Two-factor authentication support (Gemfile: devise-two-factor)

required_technologies: Ruby on Rails expertise (Ruby on Rails 8.1.0 (Gemfile))
Node.js for streaming (Node.js streaming server (streaming/package.json: express, ws))
